privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated default portfolio data created dynamically by the setup scripts. All target parameters for the new portfolio transaction (TSLA, 40 units at 171.05 on Mar 15, 2024) and the portfolio names ('Retirement Fund', 'My Portfolio') exactly match the task description instructions. The JStock data path was also confirmed as accurate relative to the setup scripts and export scripts.
